steps.desc: Ran full suite to see the 2 failures
Ran chat tests to isolate errors
Got AttributeError detail for chat history test
Read ChatService - finalize_session has only 2 params
Read the two failing tests' expectations
Confirmed chat_history/extracted_params live on CampaignSession not Campaign
Bug1: finalize_session missing user_id param. Bug2: history endpoint reads wrong model
Add user_id param to finalize_session with ownership check

summary: Bug 1: the PUT /sessions endpoint called ChatService.finalize_session(campaign_id, params, user.id) with 3 args but the method only accepted 2, raising TypeError; added a user_id parameter with an ownership check. Bug 2: GET /{id}/chat read campaign.chat_history and campaign.extracted_params, but those columns live on CampaignSession, not Campaign, raising AttributeError; fetched the session via the repo and returned session.chat_history, session.status, session.extracted_params.
